recentArticles.title: Jessica Sula Joins Fox Drama Series ‘The Interrogator’ - Deadline
recentArticles.snippet: # Jessica Sula Joins Fox Drama Series ‘The Interrogator’. **EXCLUSIVE:** Welsh-born Jessica Sula (*Michael*) is set as a series regular opposite Stephen Fry in *The Interrogator*, Fox‘s upcoming drama series. *The Interrogator,* from Lionsgate Television and Fox Entertainment Studios, received a 12-episode straight-to-series order for the 2026-27 season earlier this year. - Reality TV Summit](https://deadline.com/2026/05/reality-shows-filmed-in-us-abroad-jay-pharoah-1236880499/). ### 'The Quiz With Balls' Jay Pharoah On Hosting The Wettest Game Show On TV - Reality TV Summit](https://deadline.com/2026/05/the-quiz-with-balls-jay-pharoah-wettest-game-show-on-tv-1236880171/). Sula’s Astrid is a criminal psychologist, who’s sharp, funny and idealistic, and though a novice to the spy game, a natural. She’s the somewhat estranged daughter to Henry, and it’s clear she inherited her father’s natural ability to read people as well as his gift for guile – she could have been a successful con artist. She can also be seen in a series regular role on *Panic* for Amazon as well as starring in the Welcome Villain reboot of *The Last Shift, Malum*.

recentArticles.title: Chris Brown Releases New Album ‘Brown’ Featuring NBA YoungBoy, GloRilla & More: Stream It Now - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Chris Brown Releases New Album ‘Brown’ Featuring NBA YoungBoy, GloRilla & More: Stream It Now. CB's 12th studio album is here ahead of the R&B legend's tour alongside Usher. Chris Brown returned on Friday (May 8) to deliver his 12th studio album, *Brown*. “Dis is so tight thank u for having me apart of it I love you Bhrisssssss,” Sexyy Red wrote in CB’s comments on Instagram May 5 in appreciation of being invited into his world for the album. ### Chris Brown. Chris Brown is slated to hit the road later this year for the blockbuster R&B Tour withUsher. The trek will kick off in Denver on June 26, and wrap up on Dec. 11 in Tampa Bay, Fla. In between, the duo will be making stops in New Jersey, Detroit, D.C., Cleveland, Toronto, Boston, Chicago, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Dallas, Houston, Atlanta, New Orleans and Miami. The 37-year-old recently welcomed a baby boy with influencer Jada Wallace in April, making Breezy a father of four. ### Get in the know on.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson biopic revives legend of Jewish music mogul who battled MTV’s ‘color barrier’ - The Jerusalem Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson biopic revives legend of Jewish music mogul who battled MTV’s ‘color barrier’. ## Walter Yetnikoff was one of the music industry’s most colorful figures, shepherding artists such as Billy Joel, Bruce Springsteen and Gloria Estefan, in addition to Michael Jackson. Walter Yetnikoff, president of CBS records, and Michael Jackson celebrate at the Guinness Book of World Records party honoring Michael Jackson for the top selling solo album in history at the Museum of Natural History on Feb 8, 1984. About halfway through *Michael*, the new blockbuster biopic of Michael Jackson, there is a scene in which Jackson (played by his nephew Jafaar) and his lawyer, John Branca (Miles Teller), are sitting with the president of his record label. Jackson retorts that he is a “proud Black artist” who makes his music for everyone, and that he “won’t be shoved to the back of any bus by MTV or anyone.”.

recentArticles.title: Jack Johnson Announces AU/NZ Dates With Ben Harper and John Butler - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jack Johnson Announces AU/NZ Dates With Ben Harper and John Butler. The announcement ties into Johnson's upcoming *SURFILMUSIC* project. Jack Johnson will return to Australia and New Zealand later this year, announcing a run of November dates for his SURFILMUSIC tour, joined by Ben Harper and John Butler. ### Jack Johnson. ### Jack Johnson **SURFILMUSIC** AU/NZ Tour Dates. The tour marks Johnson’s first shows in the region since 2022 and brings together three artists whose catalogs span folk, blues, roots and surf-inspired rock, with Harper and Butler both set to perform solo acoustic sets across the run. The announcement ties into Johnson’s upcoming *SURFILMUSIC* project, a soundtrack release arriving May 15 that pairs his music with a new documentary tracing his early career — from his beginnings as a competitive surfer on Oahu’s North Shore to his transition into filmmaking and music.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了Jack Johnson即將在澳洲和紐西蘭舉辦的巡迴演唱會及其新專案，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Robert Glasper and Scarface to headline Emancipation Park Juneteenth event - Houston Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # Houstonians Robert Glasper and Scarface to headline Emancipation Park Juneteenth event. A couple of Houston musical legends, jazz keyboardist Robert Glasper and hip-hop pioneer Scarface, are headlining this year's free Juneteenth celebration, dubbed Juneteenth: The Reunion, on June 19 at Emancipation Park in Third Ward, it was announced Thursday by the Emanicipation Park Conservancy. This event will mark the debut of the park's new, state-of-the-art stage that was funded by the Kinder Foundation. “This year’s Juneteenth celebration represents both a continuation of tradition and an investment in the future,” said Corey Wilson, president and CEO, Emancipation Park Conservancy, in a statement. “From a world-class lineup of artists to the inaugural performances on our new state-of-the-art stage, we are building on Emancipation Park’s historic legacy while expanding what’s possible for cultural programming and community gathering in this space.”. “Kinder Foundation is proud to support Emancipation Park as a historic and cultural cornerstone for Houston. Cary Darling is the arts and entertainment editor for the Houston Chronicle.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了Robert Glasper和Scarface將在休士頓的解放公園領銜演出六月節活動，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Charli xcx, MUNA & More: Which Is Your Favorite New Music Release of the Week? Vote! - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Charli xcx, MUNA & More: Which Is Your Favorite New Music Release of the Week? May is in full bloom, and so is the new music scene. As the first full week of the month comes to a close, *Billboard* has rounded up all of the biggest releases that just hit streaming services, including Charli xcx, MUNA and more — and we want to know which one is your favorite. Other new singles that came out this week are “Big Dog” by The Last Dinner Party, “Sell My Soul” by PJ Morton and “Lines in the Carpet” by Ashley McBryde, as well as “Dancing on the Wall” by Kelela, “Cada Vez Me Gusta Más” by Grupo Frontera x Alejandro Fernández, “Holding On to Lonely” by Waylon Payne and “I Need U” by TSHA, HoneyLuv and Ellie Maxwell. But some of the biggest releases of the beginning of May are the full-lengths released by acts such as MUNA — who returned with new album *Dancing on the Wall* — and J Balvin and Ryan Castro, who joined forces on *Omerta*.

recentArticles.title: Shakey Graves' very best Austin day - Axios
recentArticles.snippet: # Shakey Graves' very best Austin day. **Why it matters:** Nearly 40 years old, he leads a new generation of Austin musicians even as he is a father to a young child. * His new album, "Fondness, etc.," will be released May 15, he's performing this weekend at KUT Fest, and he and his wife, musician Stephanie Hunt, look after their 2-year-old daughter at their home in Buda. **We caught up** recently with Graves — born Alejandro Rose-Garcia — as part of our running series, his ideal Austin day. It's all made around and after the birth of my daughter — an old style with new themes. I try to balance the guilt of having to leave and sometimes tour — I kind of luckily make the rules, where they can come and travel with us on the road.". * "Or after pickup, I'll take my daughter to the Austin Nature and Science Center. ## More Austin stories.

However, after **Fantasy**‘s new “Do Me Right” music video, which features cameos from many of the actor’s friends, **KJ** has had it. “So, there has been something going on for a long time that I haven’t addressed because I didn’t think it was even worth addressing, but now because of how it’s impacting my life personally, I feel like I have to talk about it,” **KJ** started out his video. “I don’t usually do this, take things here to talk about, but I have to do it now because it’s hurting me and my career. “I don’t know what to do about it other than bring it here and do everything that I can to protect myself because it’s completely f-cking disrespectful and completely wrong to do that.”.

recentArticles.title: Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10 - WUKY
recentArticles.snippet: # Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10. Noah Kahan's coronation as an A-list superstar is complete, as *The Great Divide* debuts atop the *Billboard* 200 albums chart — and all of its songs land on this week's Hot 100. That record has sat on the *Billboard* 200 albums chart for more than three years — and in 2024, its title track became his first top 10 hit. But it's never taken him all the way to the top of the albums chart, until now. Consider this: On the day of *The Great Divide*'s release, Kahan's label dropped a deluxe edition (*The Great Divide: The Last of the Bugs*) on streaming services, expanding the album from 17 songs to 21. If you dream of one day landing a top 10 hit on the *Billboard* Hot 100, consider this pro tip: It's a great time to be named either Ella or Olivia.

recentArticles.title: Who is Machine Gun Kelly, the performer blending rap and rock? - Numéro
recentArticles.snippet: # Who is Machine Gun Kelly, the performer blending rap and rock? Virtually unknown in France, Machine Gun Kelly is a huge hit in the United States. The daring rocker and rapper has just become engaged to actress Megan Fox, walked the runway for Dolce & Gabbana and launched his own brand of genderless nail polish. Portrait of an artist who embodies the rise of a very noughties pop-punk aesthetic. **Machine Gun Kelly** is one of those artists who are first and foremost a phenomenon in their home country. In France, his name often comes up in the news as the new fiancé of American actress and model **Megan Fox**. The duo is reminiscent of **Angelina Jolie** and **Billy Bob Thornton** in the 2000s, or of **Pamela Anderson**‘s and **Tommy Lee**‘s wild romance. In 2018, he created a buzz by writing a diss track in response to **Eminem**’s insults. Machine Gun Kelly is also known for his acting skills.

recentArticles.title: Billie Eilish 'Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour' Film: Inside LA Premiere - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Inside Billie Eilish’s ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ L.A. Premiere: From Her Red-Carpet Debut With Nat Wolff to Moviegoers Creating Their Own Pit. The 3-D concert film hits theaters on Friday. Billie Eilish premiered her concert film *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)* on Wednesday night (May 6) at L.A.’s Fox Westwood Theater, hitting the red carpet with co-director James Cameron, her parents and her brother Finneas. *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)* is Eilish’s third concert film and first with fellow Oscar winner Cameron. The concert film brings fans the experience of seeing Eilish on her epic arena tour in support of her 2024 album *Hit Me Hard and Soft* as well as behind-the-scenes looks at the setup for the show. *Hit Me Hard and Soft*: *The Tour (Live in 3D)* ends with Eilish in her happy place: with puppies.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalog Floods Charts - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalog Floods Charts. The late icon more than doubles his previous best total, as *Thriller* and "Billie Jean" lead his albums and songs' returns. Confirming projections reported in late April, Michael Jackson obliterates his personal-best domestic streaming week following the release of the *Michael* biopic. The King of Pop’s solo song catalog registered a collective 137.5 million official on-demand streams for the week of April 24-30 in the United States, according to Luminate, up 146% and more than doubling his previous career high. ### Michael Jackson’s Top 50 Hit Songs on the Billboard Hot 100. Before his nine-digit streaming haul, Jackson’s solo catalog achieved a new personal benchmark last week at 55.9 million song clicks. *Thriller* classic “Billie Jean” leads the song recap, as it repeats its usual standing as the catalog’s most streamed song (9.4 million) and returns to the Billboard Hot 100 at No. 38.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於麥可傑克森因傳記電影上映而創下串流新高，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Shatters His Best Streaming Week Total After Biopic Release, as Catalogue Floods Charts - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: The late icon more than doubles his previous best total, as *Thriller* and "Billie Jean" lead his albums and songs' returns. Confirming projections reported in late April, Michael Jackson obliterates his personal-best domestic streaming week following the release of the *Michael* biopic. The King of Pop’s solo song catalogue registered a collective 137.5 million official on-demand streams for the week of April 24-30 in the United States, according to Luminate, up 146% and more than doubling his previous career high. Prior to the *Michael* era, the late icon, who died in 2009, recorded a high of 53.7 million for the week of Oct. 25-31, 2019, spurred by the now-annual Halloween resurgence for “Thriller.”. *Michael* covers Jackson’s life from 1966 to 1988, including time with both The Jackson 5 and The Jacksons groups with his brothers. *Thriller* classic “Billie Jean” leads the song recap, as it repeats its usual standing as the catalogue’s most streamed song (9.4 million) and returns to the Billboard Hot 100 at No. 38.

recentArticles.title: SEVENTEEN’s JOSHUA Takes Us Out and Reveals How John Mayer Inspired Him, Love for Justin Bieber - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # SEVENTEEN’s JOSHUA Takes Us Out and Reveals How John Mayer Inspired Him, Love for Justin Bieber. In this episode of *Billboard*‘s *Takes Us Out*, JOSHUA speaks with host Tetris Kelly about touring with the full SEVENTEEN unit, wanting to do Coachella, getting into acting and much more over a meal of Korean seafood at Noryangjin Fisheries Wholesale Market, a 24-hour fish market in Seoul. The K-pop idol shares that he is producing solo music, and with that, he is getting into songwriting, something he historically did not have time to do before. The singer also talks about what kind of music he wants to put out as a solo act: “I want to show acoustic music because that’s what I grew up on and that’s how I got into music, so I want to show more of that side of myself to me fans.”.

recentArticles.title: ‘Australia Punches Over its Playing Weight’: Primary Wave CEO Larry Mestel Talks Local Music Industry (EXCLUSIVE) - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: We are, right now, the largest independent music company I think in the world in terms of legacy artists. Most importantly, we’re in the legacy protection business and we think it’s a win-win for artists and our company and fans, by the way, to the extent that we’re successful in protecting that legacy by growing new revenue streams for the band, you know? We want to make sure that we’re working with pop culture artists like Kendrick, like Bruno, that like the idea of sampling, and using some of our legacy music. They’re thinking, ‘Oh my God, my life’s gonna go on forever’, and then 20 years later, when the same artists are in their 80s, maybe it’s time to estate plan, right? Maybe it’s time to bring on a partner, to think about legacy protection… it’s a great market right now for that.

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé stuns wearing skeletal gown at Met Gala with Jay-Z, Blue Ivy - usatoday.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Beyoncé stuns wearing skeletal gown at Met Gala with Jay-Z, Blue Ivy. Updated May 4, 2026, 10:53 p.m. ET. Beyoncé has arrived at the 2026 Met Gala, making a grand entrance with husband Jay-Z and daughter Blue Ivy Carter. The Grammy-winning singer graced the red carpet with her family at the Metropolitan Museum of Art's 2026 spring exhibition on May 4, where the theme was "Costume Art" and the dress code was "Fashion Is Art.". Jay-Z opted for a classic black tuxedo with a vest. This year marks Beyoncé's first Met Gala appearance in a decade. She last appeared in 2016 for the "Manus x Machina" gala, donning a nude-colored Givenchy Haute Couture dress. This is the first time Beyoncé's daughter has appeared at the Met Gala. ## Beyoncé and Jay-Z last appeared at the Met Gala together in 2015. Jay-Z last appeared at the Met Gala in 2015 alongside Beyoncé for the "China: Through the Looking Glass" Costume Institute Benefit Gala.

recentArticles.title: Louis C.K. Gets Standing Ovation at Raunchy Comeback Show During Netflix Comedy Festival - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: After slowly rebuilding his career following 2017's sexual misconduct allegations, the comedian headlined the Hollywood Bowl as part of Netflix is a Joke fest. Cut to 2026, and he headlined a show at the Hollywood Bowl as part of the Netflix is a Joke comedy festival. C.K. took the stage in L.A. on Tuesday night, the show serving as the final stop of the worldwide “Ridiculous” tour he’s been on for the last year. It’s not his only gig with Netflix either, as in addition to the comedy festival, the streamer will premiere C.K.’s upcoming comedy special, *Ridiculous*, on the platform this summer. In an email to his newsletter subscribers when the Netflix is a Joke appearance was first announced, C.K. called the Hollywood Bowl set “the very last show of this tour which has taken me around the world and will likely be my last full-scale comedy headline type show for a looong time.” He added, “I hope you can make it.”.

recentArticles.title: Sting won’t leave fortune to his children, says not making them work is ‘a form of abuse’ - Fox News

In a recent sit down with "CBS Sunday Morning," the 74-year-old musician spoke about his philosophy when it comes to an inheritance, noting he thinks "the worst thing you can do to a kid is to say, 'You don't have to work.'". "I think that's a form of abuse that I hope I'm never guilty of," he shared. > "I think the worst thing you can do to a kid is to say, 'You don't have to work.' recentArticles.title: How Much Did Michael Jackson’s Streams Increase Following the Release of ‘Michael’ Biopic? - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: This week: Michael Jackson’s catalog sees massive gains in the wake of the successful first weekend for the* Michael *biopic, Prince and Beyoncé *fans commemorate two very different kinds of 10th anniversaries*, Death Cab for Cutie still packs a TV-synching punch and more.*. Jackson’s song streams have soared in the wake of his biopic *Michael*, more than doubling in the immediate days after the film’s wide release on April 24. Preliminary reports have The Jackson 5’s catalog at 3.4 million streams from April 24-26, up 89% from the corresponding days in the prior week. Based on those three days of activity, the first post-*Michael* week is well positioned to give Jackson his biggest U.S. streaming week ever, in terms of official on-demand streams for his solo work. As anticipation for *Michael* swelled in recent weeks, Jackson’s catalog set new personal bests in streaming for the last two weeks – with 50.6 million clicks in the April 10-16 period and 55.3 million April 17-23.

recentArticles.snippet: # Chris Brown Reveals GloRilla, YoungBoy Never Broke Again & More to Appear on His New Album ‘Brown’. Chris Brown’s 12th studio album, *Brown*, is set to arrive Friday (May 8), and CB revealed the star-studded cast that’s joining him on the LP on Tuesday (May 5), which serves as the singer’s 37th birthday. ### Chris Brown. The Virginia legend took it back to 1966 for a vintage black-and-white trailer revealing his loaded guest list by turning his features into classic R&B singers who are part of the lineup for “A Night of Soul” at the “House of Brown.”. YoungBoy Never Broke Again, GloRilla, Vybz Kartel, Leon Thomas, Bryson Tiller, Tank, Fridayy,Sexyy Red and Lucky Daye are set to join C. Fans seemed to be hyped that Chris Brown and Lucky Daye were teaming up for a collab. It’s been a busy rollout for Chris Brown leading up to the LP, even outside the studio. ### Get in the know on.

recentArticles.title: JayDon Is Building His Moment One Sold-Out Show at a Time - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # JayDon Is Building His Moment One Sold-Out Show at a Time. It’s the product of family, faith, and years spent sharpening his craft long before the spotlight widened to include his own headlining tour. Despite his youth, McCrary has already cemented himself as one of the rising names in entertainment. Deep into his current run of sold-out shows on the Flamed Up Tour, the young actor and singer spoke to *Newsweek* about his journey, Usher's tutelage, and maintaining a level head amid it all. McCrary describes himself as someone who was “born into this,” with music acting as a source of calm even before he could articulate it. “Even when I was still in diapers, that’s the only thing that would calm me down,” he says with a laugh. That was the first time I really fell in love with dancing.”. “I feel like I have more of a foundation when it comes to entertainment as a whole.

recentArticles.title: 8 Celebrities Who Love Motorcycles With A Passion - Jalopnik
recentArticles.snippet: It's an escape, and in some cases, a way of life. We're not here to say who has the largest or priciest two-wheeled fleet, but to talk about celebrities with an itch only a motorcycle can scratch. It should come as no surprise that the man with one of the most enviable garages in the world loves motorcycles. That man is Jay Leno, a TV host-turned-collector with an exquisite 180-plus car collection featuring some of the most expensive cars in the world, complemented by a fleet of over 160 motorbikes. So it's odd to hear that some of Reeves' early film contracts banned him from riding, but it's not too shocking given the risks of a motorcycle crash to such a valuable star. In fact, he once told Esquire that riding is "the best feeling in the world." It's a passion rooted so deeply that it drove the Scottish actor — and his friend, Charley Boorman — to ride from London to New York in April 2004 for the TV series "Long Way Round." The duo did so astride a 1,130cc flat-twin BMW R1150GS, covering 22,345 miles across Europe, Asia, and North America.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞摘要主要討論其他名人對摩托車的熱愛，並未提及周杰倫。
